title: Manufacturing
metaTitle: Manufacturing & Production Software · BOM & Costing · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Plan production with bills of materials, work orders and real costing. Consume raw stock, build finished goods, know your true margin. Works worldwide.
keywords: manufacturing software, production management, bill of materials, bom, work orders, production costing, finished goods
heroTitle: Make to order, cost to the rial
heroSubtitle: Turn raw materials into finished goods with bills of materials and work orders, while Paper & Pen tracks every component cost so you always know your real margin.
heroBullets: Bills of materials and work orders

features.title: Bills of materials
features.desc: Define what goes into each product, with quantities and sub-assemblies.

features.title: Work orders
features.desc: Plan and track production runs from raw materials to finished stock.

features.title: Auto stock moves
features.desc: Raw materials are consumed and finished goods added as you build.

features.title: Production costing
features.desc: Roll up material and overhead cost into an accurate finished-goods value.

features.title: Margin visibility
features.desc: Compare production cost to sale price and see true margin per item.

features.title: Linked end to end
features.desc: Connect purchasing, inventory and sales in one continuous flow.

sections.title: From recipe to finished goods
sections.body: Define a bill of materials once and Paper & Pen knows exactly what each build consumes. Raise a work order, and raw stock is reserved and consumed while finished goods are added to inventory, with all the costing handled for you.

sections.title: Costing that tells the truth
sections.body: Guessing your cost is guessing your profit. Paper & Pen rolls material and overhead into a real finished-goods cost, posts it to your books, and shows the margin on every sale. Works in any currency, so you can source and sell across borders.

faqs.a: Manufacturing is an optional paid add-on. The core Sales & Invoicing module is free forever, and you add Manufacturing when you produce goods.

faqs.q: Can I define bills of materials?
faqs.a: Yes. Build a BOM for each product, including sub-assemblies, and reuse it across every production run.
Yes. When you process a work order, raw materials are consumed and finished goods are added to inventory automatically.
Material and overhead costs roll up into the finished-goods value, which posts to accounting so your margins are accurate.

faqs.q: Does it work for any currency?
faqs.a: Yes. Purchase materials and sell finished goods in any currency, with costing and accounting kept in sync.

ctaSub: Start free with invoicing and add Manufacturing to plan production and know your true margin.
